text: I feel curious and contemplative here. The sound of water flowing echoes through this modern hallway, almost at odds with the sterile lighting and glass walls. Entering the R+D exhibit, my mind stirs with the juxtaposition of art and science, the urge to create and understand. The thoughtfulness in the displays compels me to ponder the ways in which progress, like flowing water, is both constant and unpredictable. I feel a subtle but invigorating sense of anticipation about what innovation might emerge next.
